items.title: Travelers Financial Solutions Supports Beautifi Financial Solutions' Launch of New Underwriting Facility to Expand Equipment Financing Access for Clinics
items.description: VANCOUVER, BC / ACCESS Newswire / January 12, 2026 / Beautifi Financial Solutions (Beautifi) today announced the launch of a new underwriting facility designed to expand access to commercial equipment financing for aesthetic, medical, and dental clinics. ...
